grammarInScope: C2 is not more grammar. It is pragmatic, stylistic, and cultural mastery at the level of a cultured native speaker.
Literary, essayistic, and technical texts as primary input material
Complex mediation: summarizing a technical report for a general audience
Deep dialectal variation: rioplatense, andino, caribeno, peninsular

inappropriateExerciseTypes.reason: Mechanical fill-in-the-blank too simple for C2 level
Mechanical multiple choice too simple for C2 level
Pure conjugation paradigm drilling has no place at C2
Word lists without context do not serve C2 lexical development
Crossword too cognitively simple for C2 level
Word search too cognitively simple for C2 level
Memory/pairs too cognitively simple for C2 level

vocabularyApproach: Academic and literary depth: precision, stylistic register, dialectal awareness, rhetorical figures, intertextual references.
metalanguageLevel: Full academic, rhetorical, and stylistic metalanguage. C2 lessons are language seminars, not traditional classes.
errorCorrection: Self-correction with teacher recasting. Focus on register, style, and dialectal precision. Seminar-style feedback: two strengths and one improvement area.

noticingTask.guidance: Use ungraded authentic literary or journalistic texts. Student leads analysis. Discovery questions are seminar-level: what does the author achieve with this choice? Noticing tasks focus on pragmatic and sociolinguistic nuance, not morphosyntax.

guidedWriting.complexity: Nuanced, sophisticated topics. Near-native stylistic control.
